findings.summary: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.08 (foreground color: #6347eb, background color: #17171c, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
